task_description: Add professional DAW workflow features and improve synthesis quality: WAV/stem export with stereo guitar doubling, song structure enhancements with tempo automation and DAW marker exports, and enhanced synthesis quality with better drums/bass/guitar articulations and a proper mix bus.

verification.summary: npm run build (tsc -b && vite build) passes cleanly. No test framework exists. All 3 features implemented and review issues fixed.
